docs.name: Building a Kalshi Sports Trading App With Plain-Language PDF Reports
docs.path: C:\dev\lantern-os-sec\data\ingest\imagesandreports-2026-06-02\imagesandreports\Building a Kalshi Sports Trading App With Plain-Language PDF Reports.pdf
docs.pdfTitle: Building a Kalshi Sports Trading App With Plain-Language PDF Reports
docs.textSnippet:
Building a Kalshi Sports Trading App With Plain-
Language PDF Reports
Executive summary
A Kalshi market trading app for tonight’s games is technically feasible with Kalshi’s oﬃcial API stack. The
platform exposes REST endpoints for markets, events, milestones, order placement, balances, positions,
and settlements; authenticated WebSocket streams for real-time updates; a FIX interface for more
advanced workﬂows; and oﬃcial Python and TypeScript SDKs. Authentication is based on API keys plus RSA-
PSS request signing, and the current production REST base URL is 
https://external-api.kalshi.com/tr

docs.name: lantern-3-to-12-minus-1-convergence-methodology
docs.textSnippet:
Lantern OS: 3^12 - 1 Convergence Methodology
Candidate design contract for current Lantern OS work: bounded, evidence-backed, safe/fun/easy prioritization
without breaking streams or streamables.
Core Formula
3^12 - 1 = 531,440 non-empty convergence paths. This is a planning frame, not a claim that every path has been
executed. Each of the 12 Lantern convergence steps receives one ternary state: hold, safe, or fun. The
all-hold/no-op path is excluded.
Ternary Step States
State
Meaning
Use when
0 hold
No remote-safe action

docs.name: LANTERN-OS-ROBINHOOD-TEST-ACTIONS-2026-05-29
docs.textSnippet:
Lantern OS - Robinhood Same-Day Test Actions
Research-only PDF. This is a paper/live-micro test framework for Robinhood-style trading, not financial advice and not a command
to buy or sell. Default action is paper-trade. Live action is capped-risk only.
Best Action Rule
Do not hunt random contracts. First identify market regime, then pick the safest instrument that expresses the signal. For a
small high-risk sleeve, SPY or QQQ are the cleanest starting points because liquidity and spreads are usually better than
single-name options. Day trading and options can lose money quickly; margin day tr

1
Lantern OS - Two Convergences
Founder report distilled from uploaded notes. Brand posture: Orion/Lantern, local-first, no fake dashboards,
human-readable, action-oriented.

docs.name: mocanu

Physics 342 Final Project:
Entangled Photons and Quantum Teleportation
Laura M. Mocanu
March 10, 2011
Abstract
This paper contains an overview of the concept of photon entan-
glement and discusses generating EPR photon pairs and performing
Bell state measurements on them. The procedure of quantum telepor-
tation, or transferring the quantum state of a particle onto another
particle, is described in detail. The experimental progress in perform-
ing such operations is reviewed in relationship to the developing ﬁeld
of quantum communication.

TELEPORTATION
ESSAY FOR THE COURSE
QUANTUM MECHANICS FOR MATHEMATICIANS
ANNE VAN WEERDEN
SUPERVISOR
DR B.R.U. DHERIN
UTRECHT UNIVERSITY
JUNE 

PREFACE
The aim of this essay is to describe the teleportation process in such a way that it will be clear what
is done so far, and what is still needed, to develop a teleportation device for humans, which would be
my ultimate goal. However much is done already, there are thresholds that still have to be overcome,
some of which will need real ingenuity, and others brute computing power, far more than we are
now capable of. But I will show why I have

o talk about love is to talk 
about what Plato calls “holy 
madness.” 
Jung 
refused 
to include love in any of 
his 
classic 
categories 
of 
archetype, 
function, 
or 
complex; love finally defied psychological 
description. Perhaps that is why love has 
so many false meanings. Perhaps that is 
why Jesus never defined love, but instead 
made it a command: You must love, you 
absolutely must enter into this unnamable 
mystery if you are to know God and 
know yourself!

about love and get at this holy madness, 
let’s consider two images: a mirror and a ma
